nuggets.headline: From Bogota to Fairfax: Pete Rango's Early Musical Escape
nuggets.text: Pete Rango's musical journey began when he was just nine years old, teaching himself guitar in Bogota, Colombia, after a clash with his teacher. Two years later, his family moved to Fairfax, Virginia, seeking refuge from guerrilla persecution. It was this early DIY spirit that blossomed as he formed a metal/hardcore band in high school, which pushed him to learn recording and production on his own.

source.title: Music Producer, Pete Rango on The LIFE CHANGES Show
source.quoteSnippet: Pete Rango was born in Bogota, Colombia... moved to Fairfax... [at] 11 years old due to persecution by guerrilla forces... started teaching himself how to play guitar because he couldn’t get along with his teacher... started a metal/hardcore band… the catalyst for him wanting to learn how to record, mix, and produce his own records.

nuggets.imageCaption: Pete Rango, a multi-instrumentalist, playing bass in the studio.

nuggets.headline: Disrupting the System with 'Savage Planet' Sound
nuggets.text: You're listening to "Oms at Play" from Pete Rango's 2022 album, *Savage Planet*. This album, which also features tracks like "Planet X" and "Traag Park" with Xmane, directly reflects Pete's core philosophy: to disrupt, uplift, and challenge the system. As an artist, producer, and culture-builder, Pete crafts entire sonic worlds where community, creativity, and technology come together, all powered by his signature DIY spirit.

source.title: rush | PETE RANGO
source.quoteSnippet: Pete Rango is a Colombian artist, producer, and culture-builder... pushing a DIY spirit... building worlds where community, creativity, and technology collide, aiming to disrupt, uplift, and challenge the system.

nuggets.imageCaption: Oms at Play by Pete Rango

nuggets.headline: If 'Oms at Play' grooves, explore FKJ's eclectic sound
nuggets.text: If you're digging the inventive blend of sounds in "Oms at Play," you've got to check out FKJ, also known as French Kiwi Juice. He's a multi-instrumentalist and producer who masterfully weaves live instrumentation with electronic beats, creating a smooth, soulful, and often improvisational vibe that feels genuinely fresh. His music often builds similar intricate, genre-bending worlds that Pete Rango creates.

source.title: rush | PETE RANGO
source.quoteSnippet: FKJ (French Kiwi Juice) is a French musician, singer, and record producer from Tours. He is known for his extensive live looping sets and diverse musical influences.

nuggets.imageCaption: FKJ, a multi-instrumentalist known for his soulful electronic productions.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is a Colombian artist, producer, and culture-builder based in Richmond, Virginia. He champions a DIY spirit, creating vibrant worlds where creativity, technology, and community fuse to challenge and uplift the system. His diverse background spans hip-hop production, electronic music, and extensive live audio engineering.
